attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; excels in reduced bunch sprints with perfectly timed late kicks inside final 500m. Thrives when late breakaways are absorbed, positioning for sprint finishes.
team_tactics: Limited data on team setup, but appears to operate with autonomy in reduced sprints. No clear evidence of dedicated lead-out train; relies on individual positioning and timing.
terrain_preference: Reduced bunch scenarios after selective racing suit him best. Struggles on steep gradients (10%+) and altitude. Technical sprint finishes expose poor road furniture awareness.
vulnerability: Steep climbs and altitude drop him from contention. Technical finishes with road furniture pose crash risk. Cannot match pure climbers on 10%+ gradients for GC ambitions.
key_patterns: Punches above pure sprinter weight in reduced groups after selective racing (2 observations)
Perfectly timed late kicks inside final 500m deliver wins from non-favorite positions (2 observations)
Dropped on steep gradients 10%+ and altitude, limiting stage race GC ambitions (2 observations)
Technical finishing circuits reveal poor awareness of road furniture, crash risk (1 major incident)
form_trajectory: negative: 2021 Giro showed fundamental limitation on steep/altitude climbs that undermines Grand Tour ambitions beyond stage hunting
